title.ko: 탄화수소유의 분해 증류; 액체 탄화수소 혼합물의 제조, 예. 분해 수소화, 올리고머화(Oligomerisation), 중합 반응(분해에 의한 수소 또는 합성 가스의 제조 C01B; 탄화수소 가스의 분해 또는 열분해에 의한 개개의 탄화수소 혹은 명확하던지 일련의 특징적인 구성을 갖는 탄화수소 혼합물의 제조 C07C; 분해에 의한 코크스의 제조 C10B; 유혈암, 유사 또는 가스로부터의 탄화수소유의 회수; 주로 탄화수소로 된 혼합물의 정제; 나프타의 개질; 광물납
title.en: CRACKING HYDROCARBON OILS; PRODUCTION OF LIQUID HYDROCARBON MIXTURES, e.g. BY DESTRUCTIVE HYDROGENATION, OLIGOMERISATION, POLYMERISATION (cracking to hydrogen or synthesis gas C01B;cracking or pyrolysis of hydrocarbon gases to individual hydrocarbons or mixtures thereof of definite or specified constitution C07C;cracking to cokes C10B); RECOVERY OF HYDROCARBON OILS FROM OIL-SHALE, OIL-SAND, OR GASES; REFINING MIXTURES MAINLY CONSISTING OF HYDROCARBONS; REFORMING OF NAPHTHA; MINERAL WAXES

definition.ko: 액체탄화수소혼합물의 제조 C10G1/00 ～ 5/00, C10G50/00 탄화수소유의 증류 C10G7/00 분해 C10G9/00 ～ 15/00, C10G47/00 탄화수소유의 정제 산 또는 알카리를 사용하는 처리 C10G17/00, C10G19/00 용제 또는 고체흡착제를 사용하는 추출에 의한 C10G21/00, C10G25/00 수소와의 반응 또는 기타 화학반응에 의한 것 C10G27/00, C10G29/00, C10G45/00, C10G49/00 리포밍(REFORMING) C10G35/00, C10G59/00 ～ 63/00 리포밍(REFORMING) C10G35/00, C10G59/00 ～ 63/00 다단 공정 C10G51/00 ～ 69/00 다른 공정 C10G70/00, C10G71/00 무기왁스의 처리 C10G73/00 부식 방지 C10G75/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제 사항 C10G99/00

title.ko: 유혈암, 유사, 비용융성 고형 탄소질 원료 또는 유사 원료, 예. 목재, 석탄에서 액체 탄화수소 혼합물의 제조(유혈암, 유사 및 유사물로부터 오일의 기계적 취득 방법 B03B)
title.en: Production of liquid hydrocarbon mixtures from oil shale, oil-sand, or non-melting solid carbonaceous or similar materials, e.g. wood, coal (mechanical winning of oil from oil-shales, oil-sand, or the like B03B)
Production of liquid hydrocarbon mixtures of undefined composition from oxides of carbon

title.ko: 산소 함유 유기 원료, 예. 지방유, 지방산에서 액체 탄화수소 혼합물의 제조(비용해성 고형 산소 함유 탄소질 원료에서의 제조 C10G 1/00)
title.en: Production of liquid hydrocarbon mixtures from oxygen-containing organic materials, e.g. fatty oils, fatty acids (production from non-melting solid oxygen-containing carbonaceous materials C10G0001000000)
Recovery of liquid hydrocarbon mixtures from gases, e.g. natural gas

title.ko: 탄화수소유의 증류

title.en: Stabilising gasoline by removing gases by fractioning

title.ko: 공비 또는 추출 증류(수소의 부재하, 선택 용제로 추출하는 탄화수소유의 정제 C10G 21/00)
title.en: Azeotropic or extractive distillation (refining of hydrocarbon oils, in the absence of hydrogen, by extraction with selective solvents C10G0021000000)
Cracking in the absence of hydrogen
Thermal non-catalytic cracking, in the absence of hydrogen, of hydrocarbon oils
in pipes or coils with or without auxiliary means, e.g. digesters, soaking drums, expansion means
with discontinuously preheated non-moving solid material, e.g. blast and run
by direct contact with inert preheated fluids, e.g. with molten metals or salts
produced by partial combustion of the material to be cracked or by combustion of another hydrocarbon
by indirect contact with preheated fluid other than hot combustion gases
by passing the material to be cracked in thin streams or as spray on or near continuously heated surfaces

title.ko: 탄화수소유의 수소 부재하에서의 촉매 분해 증류(용융 금속 또는 염과의 직접접촉에 의한 분해 C10G 9/34)
title.en: Catalytic cracking, in the absence of hydrogen, of hydrocarbon oils (cracking in direct contact with molten metals or salts C10G0009340000)
with discontinuously preheated non-moving solid catalysts, e.g. blast and run
by direct contact with inert heated gases or vapours
produced by partial combustion of the material to be cracked
Cracking of hydrocarbon oils by electric means, electromagnetic or mechanical vibrations, by particle radiation or with gases superheated in electric arcs
by electric means or by electromagnetic or mechanical vibrations
with gases superheated in an electric arc, e.g. plasma

title.ko: 산, 산 생성 화합물 또는 산 함유 액체, 예. 산 슬러지를 쓰는 수소 부재하에서 탄화수소유의 정제
title.en: Refining in the absence of hydrogen

title.ko: 산, 산 생성 화합물 또는 산 함유 액체, 예. 산 슬러지를 쓰는 수소 부재하에서 탄화수소유의 정제
title.en: Refining of hydrocarbon oils, in the absence of hydrogen, with acids, acid-forming compounds, or acid-containing liquids, e.g. acid sludge

title.ko: 산 또는 산 함유 액체, 예. 산 슬러지를 쓰는 수소 부재하에서의 탄화수소유 정제
title.en: with acids or acid-containing liquids, e.g. acid sludge

title.ko: 2개의 불혼합상을 형성하는 액체의 처리
title.en: Liquid-liquid treatment forming two immiscible phases
using acids derived from sulfur or acid sludge thereof

title.ko: 할로겐산 또는 할로겐의 옥시산을 쓰는 것(할로겐을 생성하는 산 C10G 27/02)
title.en: using halogen acids or oxyacids of halogen (acids generating halogen C10G0027020000)

title.ko: 산 형성 산화물을 사용하는 것(선택적 용제로서 CO2또는 SO2을 사용하는 정제 C10G 21/06)
title.en: with acid-forming oxides (refining with CO2 or SO2 as a selective solvent C10G0021060000)
with "solid acids", e.g. phosphoric acid deposited on a carrier
Refining hydrocarbon oils, in the absence of hydrogen, by alkaline treatment

title.ko: 선택적 용제를 쓰는 추출에 의한 수소 부재하에서의 탄화수소유 정제(C10G 17/00, C10G 19/00이 우선)
title.en: Refining of hydrocarbon oils, in the absence of hydrogen, by extraction with selective solvents (C10G0017000000, C10G0019000000 take precedence)
with two or more solvents, which are introduced or withdrawn separately
by introducing simultaneously at least two immiscible solvents counter-current to each other

title.ko: 사용하는 용제에 의하여 특징지어지는 것
유기 화합물만

title.en: Compounds containing sulfur, selenium, or tellurium

title.ko: 그룹 21/24 ～ 21/26의 하나로만 분류되지 않는 유기 화합물
title.en: Organic compounds not provided for in a single one of groups C10G0021140000-C10G0021260000
Refining of hydrocarbon oils, in the absence of hydrogen, with solid sorbents
with crystalline alumino-silicates, e.g. molecular sieves
Removal of non-hydrocarbon compounds, e.g. sulfur compounds
with moving sorbents or sorbents dispersed in the oil
Distillation in the presence of moving sorbents

title.ko: 산화에 의한 수소 부재하에서 탄화수소유의 정제
title.en: Refining of hydrocarbon oils, in the absence of hydrogen, by oxidation
with halogen or compounds generating halogen; Hypochlorous acid or salts thereof

title.ko: 산소 또는 산소 발생 화합물에 의한 것
title.en: with oxygen or compounds generating oxygen
in the presence of alkaline solutions
in the presence of copper chloride
in the presence of metal-containing organic complexes, e.g. chelates, or cationic ion-exchange resins

title.ko: 산소 발생 화합물, 예. 과화합물, 크롬산, 크롬산염(아납산염 또는 납산염을 쓰는 것 C10G 19/06)
title.en: with oxygen-generating compounds, e.g. per-compounds, chromic acid, chromates (plumbites or plumbates C10G0019060000)
Refining of hydrocarbon oils, in the absence of hydrogen, with other chemicals
Metals, or metals deposited on a carrier
Metal salts, or metal salts deposited on a carrier
containing the metal in the lower valency
Organic compounds not containing metal atoms
containing oxygen as the only hetero atom
containing sulfur as the only hetero atom, e.g. mercaptans, or sulfur and oxygen as the only hetero atoms

title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 방법에 의한 수소 부재하에서의 탄화수소유 정제(증류에 의한 것 C10G 7/00)
title.en: Refining of hydrocarbon oils, in the absence of hydrogen, by methods not otherwise provided for (by distillation C10G0007000000)
by heating, cooling, or pressure treatment
with the aid of centrifugal force
Refining of hydrocarbon oils by electric or magnetic means, by irradiation, or by using microorganisms

title.ko: 탄화수소유의 탈수 또는 해유화(증류에 의한 것 C10G 7/04)
title.en: De-watering or demulsification of hydrocarbon oils (by distillation C10G0007040000)
with mechanical means, e.g. by filtration
containing platinum group metals or compounds thereof
Bimetallic catalysts in which at least one of the metals is a platinum-group metal
containing crystalline alumino-silicates, e.g. molecular sieves
with electric, electromagnetic, or mechanical vibrations; by particle radiation
Controlling or regulating of reforming operations

title.ko: 수소 또는 수소 발생 화합물을 쓰는 탄화수소유의 정제

definition.ko: 그룹 C10G 45/02, C10G 45/32, C10G 45/44 또는 C10G 45/58의 하나로만 분류되지 않는 수소발생화합물의 존재하에서의 탄화수소유의 처리는 그룹 C10G 49/00에 포함된다.

title.ko: 수소 또는 수소 발생 화합물을 쓰는 탄화수소유의 정제
title.en: Refining of hydrocarbon oils using hydrogen or hydrogen-generating compounds

definition.ko: 그룹 C10G 45/02, C10G 45/32, C10G 45/44 또는 C10G 45/58의 하나로만 분류되지 않는 수소발생화합물의 존재하에서의 탄화수소유의 처리는 그룹 C10G 49/00에 포함된다.

containing nickel or cobalt metal, or compounds thereof
in combination with chromium, molybdenum or tungsten metal, or compounds thereof
containing platinum group metals or compounds thereof
containing crystalline alumino-silicates, e.g. molecular sieves

title.ko: 존재하는 다른 탄화수소를 분해 증류하는 일이 없이 어떤 탄화수소 성분의 골격 구조를 변화시키기 위한 것, 예. 유동점의 저하; 정상 파라핀의 선택적 수소화 분해 증류(C10G 32/00이 우선; 나프타의 옥탄가 또는 방향족 함량의 개량 또는 향상 C10G 35/00)
title.en: to change the structural skeleton of some of the hydrocarbon content without cracking the other hydrocarbons present, e.g. lowering pour point; Selective hydrocracking of normal paraffins (C10G0032000000 takes precedence;improving or increasing the octane number or aromatic content of naphtha C10G0035000000)
containing platinum group metals or compounds thereof
containing crystalline alumino-silicates, e.g. molecular sieves
with catalysts containing platinum group metals or compounds thereof

title.ko: 낮은 비점 분획을 얻기 위한 수소 또는 수소 발생 화합물의 존재하에서 탄화수소유의 분해 증류(C10G 15/00이 우선; 비용융성 탄소질 또는 유사 물질의 분해 수소화 C10G 1/06)
title.en: Cracking of hydrocarbon oils, in the presence of hydrogen or hydrogen-generating compounds, to obtain lower boiling fractions (C10G0015000000 takes precedence;destructive hydrogenation of non-melting solid carbonaceous or similar materials C10G0001060000)

Treatment of hydrocarbon oils, in the absence of hydrogen, by at least one cracking process or refining process and at least one other conversion process
Treatment of naphtha by two or more reforming processes only or by at least one reforming process and at least one process which does not substantially change the boiling range of the naphtha
